prompt:
An external backup SSD enclosure sits on a wooden desk, connected to a laptop via a short USB-C cable. A small status LED on the enclosure glows softly, and on the laptop screen a stylized backup dashboard shows a database icon and a progress bar, indicating nightly dumps being stored on the drive. The SSD enclosure is sleek and minimalist, with no readable branding, and a “cluster” of small server or container icons is subtly visible in the UI to hint at its role in backing up a cluster.

Near-future solarpunk workspace aesthetic with warm lighting, a plant or two, and perhaps a tiny solar panel near the window. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering, no brand logos or legible text on the SSD or UI. The composition should clearly convey the idea of an external SSD used for nightly database backups.
